Left winner: I none, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT win, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR lost, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT lost

Longest Left: AND-NOT 14-0 25-1 36-2 47-3
Longest Right: I 0-7 7-6 6-5 5-4

4 + 4 = 8 = 8
Not truncating

0 AND-NOT 14
1 AND-NOT 25
2 AND-NOT 36
3 AND-NOT 47

7 I 0

Preferred from left
0 AND-NOT 14
1 AND-NOT 25
2 AND-NOT 36
3 AND-NOT 47
4 I 5
5 I 6
6 I 7
7 I 0

Preferred from right
7 I 0
6 I 7
5 I 6
4 I 5
3 AND-NOT 47
2 AND-NOT 36
1 AND-NOT 25
0 AND-NOT 14

Matched
0 AND-NOT 14
1 AND-NOT 25
2 AND-NOT 36
3 AND-NOT 47
4 I 5
5 I 6
6 I 7
7 I 0

Applying to 01111010
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND-NOT 14 = AND(I 1,I 4n) = AND(I 1,NOT(I 4)) = AND(1,NOT(1)) = AND(1,0) = 0
1 AND-NOT 25 = AND(I 2,I 5n) = AND(I 2,NOT(I 5)) = AND(1,NOT(0)) = AND(1,1) = 1
2 AND-NOT 36 = AND(I 3,I 6n) = AND(I 3,NOT(I 6)) = AND(1,NOT(1)) = AND(1,0) = 0
3 AND-NOT 47 = AND(I 4,I 7n) = AND(I 4,NOT(I 7)) = AND(1,NOT(0)) = AND(1,1) = 1
4 I 5 = 0
5 I 6 = 1
6 I 7 = 0
7 I 0 = 0

\boxed{01010100}
